response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video for vocal music. The video contains a conversation from 00:00 to 00:34. From 00:34 until the end, an upbeat instrumental background track plays. No vocal performances or recognizable songs with lyrics were detected.
response.global_summary: A video featuring four VTubers in a virtual karaoke room engaging in conversation, followed by a title card screen with instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Four VTubers chatting in a virtual karaoke room.
Title card 'Karaoke Peek!?' appears with upbeat instrumental background music.
